title: NerdsCraft
description: A simple, mostly client side mod pack that just adds some QOL changes to vanilla designed for an all survival server: mc.nerdscraft.us. Most mods will work without Server-Side config besides a select few.
body: This modpack is designed to slightly enhance gameplay (as well as performance) above the base vanilla game Through QOL changes and efficiency corrections and work seamlessly with our Survival Server: **mc.nerdscraft.xyz**. Although this pack is designed to work on our setver, it works great as a standalone "Enhanced Vanilla" Modpack all around.
